defmodule Solution do
  @doc """
  Extracts width and height from a PNG binary.
  """
  def extract_dimensions(png_binary) do
    <<_signature::[[SLOT sig_size]],
      _chunk_length::[[SLOT chunk_size]],
      [[SLOT ihdr]],
      width::[[SLOT int_mod]],
      height::unsigned-big-integer-size(32),
      _rest::binary>> = png_binary
    
    {width, height}
  end
end
